title.en: URN Naming and the Informative Annexes: Reference Models, Bit Ordering, History, EtherTypes, and Wake-on-LAN
title.zh: URN 命名与资料性附录：参考模型、比特排序、历史沿革、EtherType 与 Wake-on-LAN

blocks.en: This lesson closes out IEEE Std 802-2024 by walking through two very different parts of the document: Clause 11, the only normative clause here, which gives IEEE 802 standards a tidy way to mint Uniform Resource Name (URN) values; and the seven informative annexes (A through G) that surround the standard with reference material. An informative annex is helpful background — you do not need it to build a conformant product, but it makes the standard far easier to understand and use.
blocks.zh: 本课作为 IEEE Std 802-2024 的收尾，带你走过文档中两个性质迥异的部分：第 11 章——本课唯一的规范性章节，它为 IEEE 802 标准提供了一套整洁的统一资源名称（URN，Uniform Resource Name）取值方法；以及围绕标准的七个资料性附录（A 到 G）。资料性附录是有益的背景材料——构建一个符合标准的产品并不需要它，但它让标准变得更易理解、更易使用。

blocks.en: Clause 11.1 (Introduction) explains why URNs matter. From time to time an IEEE 802 standard needs to allocate URN values — most commonly to name data models written in YANG, the data modeling language for network configuration (defined in IETF RFC 6020 and RFC 7950). A URN (Uniform Resource Name) is a persistent, location-independent name for a resource. Clause 11 defines one consistent hierarchy, built on a base URN that the Internet Assigned Numbers Authority (IANA) reserved for IEEE, so that every working group names things the same way. Consistent naming makes IEEE 802 equipment easier to implement and operate.
blocks.zh: 第 11.1 节（引言）解释了 URN 为何重要。IEEE 802 标准有时需要分配 URN 值——最常见的用途是命名用 YANG 编写的数据模型（YANG 是网络配置的数据建模语言，定义于 IETF RFC 6020 和 RFC 7950）。URN（统一资源名称）是对某个资源的持久、与位置无关的命名。第 11 章定义了一套统一的层次结构，建立在因特网编号分配机构（IANA，Internet Assigned Numbers Authority）为 IEEE 保留的基础 URN 之上，使每个工作组都以相同方式命名。一致的命名让 IEEE 802 设备更易实现、更易运维。

blocks.en: Clause 11.2 fixes the front of every IEEE URN. IANA assigned IEEE the Namespace ID (NID) value 'ieee'. The Namespace Specific String (NSS) that follows always has the shape 'urn:ieee:{IEEEresource}:{ResourceSpecificString}'. Because this standard only concerns standards use, the IEEEresource slot is always 'std'. So every standards URN looks like 'urn:ieee:std:{ResourceSpecificString}'. All the strings are case-insensitive, and the whole scheme conforms to IETF RFC 3406 and RFC 8069.
blocks.zh: 第 11.2 节固定了每个 IEEE URN 的开头。IANA 为 IEEE 分配了命名空间标识（NID，Namespace ID）值 'ieee'。其后的命名空间特定字符串（NSS，Namespace Specific String）始终采用 'urn:ieee:{IEEEresource}:{ResourceSpecificString}' 的形式。由于本标准只关注标准用途，IEEEresource 这一段始终为 'std'。因此每个标准类 URN 都形如 'urn:ieee:std:{ResourceSpecificString}'。所有字符串都不区分大小写，整套方案符合 IETF RFC 3406 与 RFC 8069。

blocks.en: Clause 11.3 breaks open the tail — the ResourceSpecificString — for IEEE 802 standards. It has three colon-separated fields: '{IEEE standard designation}:{resourceType}:{resourceIdentifier}'. The standard designation is the base standard's number (e.g. '802.1Q' or '802.11'), never an amendment's number, and never contains colons. The resourceType is a single shared value across all of IEEE 802: 'yang', used for any URN created in a YANG module. The resourceIdentifier names the specific resource inside that standard. So a YANG URN in IEEE Std 802.11 looks like 'urn:ieee:std:802.11:yang:{resourceIdentifier}'.
blocks.zh: 第 11.3 节针对 IEEE 802 标准拆解了尾部——资源特定字符串。它由三个以冒号分隔的字段组成：'{IEEE 标准代号}:{resourceType}:{resourceIdentifier}'。标准代号是基础标准的编号（如 '802.1Q' 或 '802.11'），绝不使用修订版的编号，也不包含冒号。resourceType 在整个 IEEE 802 中只有一个共享取值：'yang'，用于 YANG 模块中创建的任何 URN。resourceIdentifier 命名该标准内部的具体资源。因此 IEEE Std 802.11 中一个 YANG 类 URN 形如 'urn:ieee:std:802.11:yang:{resourceIdentifier}'。

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 560 120" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><rect x="6" y="40" width="70" height="36"/><rect x="76" y="40" width="80" height="36"/><rect x="156" y="40" width="60" height="36"/><rect x="216" y="40" width="150" height="36"/><rect x="366" y="40" width="90" height="36"/><rect x="456" y="40" width="98" height="36"/><text x="41" y="63" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="13" text-anchor="middle">urn</text><text x="116" y="63" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="13" text-anchor="middle">ieee (NID)</text><text x="186" y="63" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="13" text-anchor="middle">std</text><text x="291" y="63" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="12" text-anchor="middle">802.11 (designation)</text><text x="411" y="63" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="12" text-anchor="middle">yang (type)</text><text x="505" y="63" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">resourceId</text><text x="6" y="28" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="12">urn:ieee:std:802.11:yang:{resourceIdentifier}</text></svg>

caption.en: How an IEEE 802 URN decomposes: fixed prefix urn:ieee:std, then the base standard designation, then the resourceType 'yang', then the per-resource identifier (Clauses 11.2 and 11.3).
caption.zh: 一个 IEEE 802 URN 的分解方式：固定前缀 urn:ieee:std，随后是基础标准代号、resourceType 'yang'，最后是逐资源的标识符（第 11.2 与 11.3 节）。

blocks.en: Mental model: the URN scheme is like a postal address read left to right — 'urn:ieee:std' is the country and city (always the same), the standard designation is the street, and the resourceIdentifier is the house number. New resourceType values can be added by future amendments, but today every YANG resource shares the single type 'yang'.
blocks.zh: 心智模型：URN 方案就像从左到右读的邮政地址——'urn:ieee:std' 是国家和城市（始终不变），标准代号是街道，resourceIdentifier 是门牌号。未来的修订可以增加新的 resourceType 取值，但如今每个 YANG 资源都共用唯一的类型 'yang'。

blocks.en: The rest of the standard is informative annexes. Annex A (Bibliography) collects resources that are helpful but not required to implement the standard — IEEE 802 documents like IEEE Std 802.3 Ethernet, and many IETF RFCs (for example RFC 6020 and RFC 7950 for YANG, and the SNMP and SMIv2 RFCs). Each entry carries a bracketed label such as [B16] that the main text cites. Annex B (Reference models) is the visual heart of the back matter: it draws the layered reference model (RM) — the stack of MAC and PHY sublayers and the service access points (SAPs) between them — for each major IEEE 802 family, including IEEE 802.3, the four interconnection models of IEEE 802.11, IEEE 802.15, IEEE 802.16, IEEE 802.21, and IEEE 802.22.
blocks.zh: 标准的其余部分都是资料性附录。附录 A（参考文献）汇集了有益但非实现所必需的资源——IEEE 802 文档（如 IEEE Std 802.3 以太网），以及大量 IETF RFC（例如 YANG 的 RFC 6020 与 RFC 7950，还有 SNMP 与 SMIv2 系列 RFC）。每条目都带有方括号标签（如 [B16]），供正文引用。附录 B（参考模型）是附录部分的视觉核心：它为每个主要 IEEE 802 家族绘制了分层的参考模型（RM，Reference Model）——MAC 与 PHY 子层的堆叠，以及它们之间的服务接入点（SAP，Service Access Point）——包括 IEEE 802.3、IEEE 802.11 的四种互连模型、IEEE 802.15、IEEE 802.16、IEEE 802.21 与 IEEE 802.22。

blocks.en:
flowchart TB
  N[Network layer] --> DL[Data link layer]
  subgraph DL[Data link layer]
    MC[MAC client] -->|LSAP| MAC[MAC sublayer]
    MAC -->|MSAP| RS[Reconciliation sublayer]
  end
  RS -->|PSAP| PHY[Physical layer]
  PHY --> M[Medium]
blocks.zh:
flowchart TB
  N[网络层] --> DL[数据链路层]
  subgraph DL[数据链路层]
    MC[MAC 客户端] -->|LSAP| MAC[MAC 子层]
    MAC -->|MSAP| RS[协调子层]
  end
  RS -->|PSAP| PHY[物理层]
  PHY --> M[介质]

blocks.en: Annex B is worth pausing on because it shows how the same skeleton — link service access point (LSAP) at the top of the MAC, MAC service access point (MSAP) below it, PHY service access point (PSAP) at the PHY — is reused and extended across families. IEEE 802.3 adds optional sublayers (reconciliation sublayer, optional MAC Control, OAM for operations/administration/maintenance) and special models for passive optical networks. IEEE 802.11's reference model is built on the functional station (STA), with four interconnection models: peer-to-peer, infrastructure (stations grouped into basic service sets, or BSSs, joined by a distribution system and reaching other networks through a portal), mesh, and the general link (GLK) model for use inside an IEEE 802.1Q bridged network.
blocks.zh: 附录 B 值得驻足，因为它展示了同一套骨架——MAC 顶部的链路服务接入点（LSAP，Link Service Access Point）、其下的 MAC 服务接入点（MSAP，MAC Service Access Point）、PHY 处的 PHY 服务接入点（PSAP，PHY Service Access Point）——如何在各家族间被复用并扩展。IEEE 802.3 增加了可选子层（协调子层、可选的 MAC Control、用于运行/管理/维护的 OAM）以及无源光网络的专用模型。IEEE 802.11 的参考模型建立在功能站点（STA，Station）之上，包含四种互连模型：点对点、基础设施（站点编组为基本服务集 BSS，由分布式系统连接，并经由门户 portal 抵达其他网络）、网状（mesh），以及供 IEEE 802.1Q 桥接网络内部使用的通用链路（GLK，General Link）模型。

blocks.en: The final five annexes are short but each gives a clause a home. Annex C (Examples of bit ordering for addresses) is now just a placeholder — it was deleted during the development of IEEE Std 802-2024, so the standard simply records that the annex no longer carries content. Annex D (List of IEEE 802 standards) is a roll call of every approved IEEE 802 standard at the time of publication, from 802.1AB through 802.22. Annex E (History) tells the story behind the address system — how universal MAC addresses began with Xerox Block IDs, became Organizationally Unique Identifiers (OUIs) under the IEEE Registration Authority (RA), then grew the MA-L / MA-M / MA-S address-block products and the local-address structures (SLAP, ELI, AAI, SAI) introduced by amendment 802c.
blocks.zh: 最后五个附录篇幅短小，但各自为某个条目提供了归宿。附录 C（地址比特排序示例）如今只是占位——它在 IEEE Std 802-2024 的制定过程中被删除，因此标准仅记录该附录不再承载内容。附录 D（IEEE 802 标准清单）是出版时所有已批准 IEEE 802 标准的点名册，从 802.1AB 到 802.22。附录 E（历史沿革）讲述了地址体系背后的故事——通用 MAC 地址如何始于施乐（Xerox）的 Block ID，如何在 IEEE 注册管理机构（RA，Registration Authority）下成为组织唯一标识符（OUI，Organizationally Unique Identifier），再发展出 MA-L / MA-M / MA-S 地址块产品，以及修订版 802c 引入的本地地址结构（SLAP、ELI、AAI、SAI）。

blocks.en: Annex F (EtherType listing subset) reproduces, for convenience, a subset of the EtherType assignments managed by the IEEE RA (described normatively in Clause 9.2.2), both as a table (Table F.1) and as a YANG module. An EtherType is the two-byte field that identifies which protocol a frame's payload carries — for example 08-00 for IPv4, 08-06 for the Address Resolution Protocol (ARP), and 08-42 for Wake-on-LAN. Annex G (Wake-on-LAN) is the very last page: it notes that Wake-on-LAN (WoL), a common way to wake a device from a very low power mode, can be carried over IEEE 802 networks as a MAC frame using EtherType 08-42 — while stressing that WoL itself is not standardized in any IEEE 802 standard. So Annex F assigns the number and Annex G explains what one of those numbers is for.
blocks.zh: 附录 F（EtherType 列表子集）为方便起见，以表格（表 F.1）和 YANG 模块两种形式，复现了 IEEE RA 管理的部分 EtherType 分配（规范性内容见第 9.2.2 节）。EtherType 是用于标识帧载荷所承载协议的双字节字段——例如 08-00 表示 IPv4，08-06 表示地址解析协议（ARP，Address Resolution Protocol），08-42 表示 Wake-on-LAN。附录 G（Wake-on-LAN）是全标准的最后一页：它指出 Wake-on-LAN（WoL，网络唤醒）——一种把设备从极低功耗模式唤醒的常用方法——可以使用 EtherType 08-42 作为 MAC 帧在 IEEE 802 网络上传输，同时强调 WoL 本身并未在任何 IEEE 802 标准中被标准化。因此附录 F 分配了编号，附录 G 解释了其中一个编号的用途。

summary.en: Coverage map — exact clause and annex locations
summary.zh: 覆盖地图——精确的章节与附录位置

blocks.en: Clause 11 (URN allocation): 11.1 Introduction — why IEEE 802 standards allocate URNs, chiefly for YANG data models (p.60). 11.2 IEEE Namespace ID and Namespace Specific String — NID 'ieee', NSS form urn:ieee:{IEEEresource}:{ResourceSpecificString}, IEEEresource fixed at 'std' (p.60). 11.3 ResourceSpecificString values — {standard designation}:{resourceType}:{resourceIdentifier}, with resourceType 'yang' shared across IEEE 802 (pp.60-61). Informative annexes: Annex A Bibliography — non-required references [B1]-[B20] (pp.62-63). Annex B Reference models — layered RMs and SAPs for IEEE 802.3, 802.11 (four interconnection models), 802.15, 802.16, 802.21, 802.22 (pp.64-75). Annex C Examples of bit ordering for addresses — deleted during development of IEEE Std 802-2024, now a placeholder (p.76). Annex D List of IEEE 802 standards — roll call of approved standards, 802.1AB through 802.22 (pp.77-78). Annex E History — universal addresses, OUI/MA-L/MA-M/MA-S, local-address SLAP/ELI/AAI/SAI (pp.79-80). Annex F EtherType listing subset — Table F.1 plus a YANG module, e.g. 08-00 ipv4, 08-06 arp, 08-42 wol (p.81). Annex G Wake-on-LAN — WoL as a MAC frame using EtherType 08-42, not itself IEEE-standardized (p.97).
blocks.zh: 第 11 章（URN 分配）：11.1 引言——IEEE 802 标准为何分配 URN，主要服务于 YANG 数据模型（第 60 页）。11.2 IEEE 命名空间标识与命名空间特定字符串——NID 为 'ieee'，NSS 形式为 urn:ieee:{IEEEresource}:{ResourceSpecificString}，IEEEresource 固定为 'std'（第 60 页）。11.3 资源特定字符串取值——{标准代号}:{resourceType}:{resourceIdentifier}，resourceType 'yang' 在 IEEE 802 内共享（第 60-61 页）。资料性附录：附录 A 参考文献——非必需引用 [B1]-[B20]（第 62-63 页）。附录 B 参考模型——IEEE 802.3、802.11（四种互连模型）、802.15、802.16、802.21、802.22 的分层 RM 与 SAP（第 64-75 页）。附录 C 地址比特排序示例——在 IEEE Std 802-2024 制定中被删除，现为占位（第 76 页）。附录 D IEEE 802 标准清单——已批准标准点名册，802.1AB 到 802.22（第 77-78 页）。附录 E 历史沿革——通用地址、OUI/MA-L/MA-M/MA-S、本地地址 SLAP/ELI/AAI/SAI（第 79-80 页）。附录 F EtherType 列表子集——表 F.1 加 YANG 模块，例如 08-00 ipv4、08-06 arp、08-42 wol（第 81 页）。附录 G Wake-on-LAN——以 EtherType 08-42 作为 MAC 帧的 WoL，其本身未被 IEEE 标准化（第 97 页）。

blocks.en: Putting it together: Clause 11 is the only normative piece here — it is a rule you must follow when you mint a URN. Everything in Annexes A-G is informative scaffolding: bibliography, pictures of the layered stacks, a standards roster, the history of addressing, and the EtherType/Wake-on-LAN reference. Knowing where each lives turns the back of the standard from filler into a quick-reference index.
blocks.zh: 汇总：第 11 章是这里唯一的规范性内容——当你铸造一个 URN 时必须遵循的规则。附录 A 到 G 中的一切都是资料性脚手架：参考文献、分层堆栈的图示、标准名册、地址体系的历史，以及 EtherType / Wake-on-LAN 参考。知道每一部分的归属，就能把标准的尾部从填充材料变成一份速查索引。

cites.note: Clause 11.1-11.3: URN allocation, NID 'ieee', NSS form urn:ieee:std:{ResourceSpecificString}, resourceType 'yang'.
Annex B Reference models — 802.3, 802.11 STA model and four interconnection models, 802.15/16/21/22.
Annex C bit ordering — deleted during development, placeholder.
Annex D List of IEEE 802 standards.
Annex E History — universal addresses, OUI/MA-L/MA-M/MA-S, SLAP/ELI/AAI/SAI.
Annex F EtherType listing subset — Table F.1, e.g. 08-00 ipv4, 08-06 arp, 08-42 wol.
Annex G Wake-on-LAN — WoL as MAC frame via EtherType 08-42, not IEEE-standardized.
